news.t: Teucrium and xETFs Launch the Teucrium xETFs 2x Long Daily BNB ETF (XBNB), Offering Amplified Exposure to the Daily Price Movements of BNB

overview.description: The Teucrium xETFs 2x Long Daily BNB ETF (XBNB) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in long bnb, short usd currency. The fund aims to provide 2x leveraged exposure to the daily price movement of BNB, less fees, and expenses.  The fund uses over-the-counter swaps, futures, and BNB-related securities to pursue its objective XBNB was launched on Apr 28, 2026 and is issued by Teucrium.

data.title: Teucrium and xETFs Launch the Teucrium xETFs 2x Long Daily BNB ETF (XBNB), Offering Amplified Exposure to the Daily Price Movements of BNB
data.text: NEW YORK--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Teucrium and xETFs launch XBNB, offering 2x long daily exposure to BNB, one of world's largest cryptocurrencies.
